text: Standing within this modern space—part museum, part laboratory—I feel a surge of curiosity. The air buzzes with the promise of innovation and the unknown. The text on the wall invites me to reflect: it speaks of darkness, uncertainty, and the quiet clarity that can emerge from obscurity. I feel both humbled and excited, reminded that every boundary between human and machine is, for now, still drawn in pencil. I am eager to listen and observe, present and patient in this landscape of questions.
